name: Orange-Glazed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 cups hot cooked rice, cooked without salt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the cornstarch, vegetable broth, lemon juice, and orange marmalade until smooth.
2. Set aside.
3. In a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, cook the chicken in 2 batches for about 10 minutes or until browned. Remove the chicken and set it aside.
4. Stir in the cornstarch mixture and add the broth back into the skillet. Cook until the mixture boils and thickens, stirring constantly. Return the chicken to the pan.
5. Reduce the heat to low. Cover and cook for 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink. Serve with rice.
6. If desired, garnish the rice with fresh parsley and the chicken with fresh thyme.
Serves 6 - 435 calories - 4 grams fat
